cells.value: Refer to IAS-5100 Removal and Installation
cells.text: Refer to IAS-5100 Removal and Installation

cells.value: Remove the motor wire and the four screws fixing the motor, take off the motor, and reinstall it in reverse order (note that the motor wiring port is on the upper left when reinstalling it)
cells.text: Remove the motor wire and the four screws fixing the motor, take off the motor, and reinstall it in reverse order (note that the motor wiring port is on the upper left when reinstalling it)

cells.value: Follow the reverse sequence of the above steps for reassembly.
cells.text: Follow the reverse sequence of the above steps for reassembly.
